info.description: Backend API for Educational Center Management System
info.title: EduCRM API

get.description: Returns list of subscription plans (with linked subjects and pricing grid) for the branch

post.description: Creates a new subscription plan with pricing grid and linked subjects

parameters.description: Search by first or last name
parameters.name: search

get.description: Returns all active subscriptions for a student

post.description: Assigns a subscription plan to a student

BearerAuth.description: Insert the token in the following format: Bearer {your_token}
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
